message:
fix(ffs-ondisk): correct dir + extent block checksum coverage areas

Directory block checksums must exclude the entire 12-byte tail struct
(not just 4 bytes). Extent block checksums use the tail offset formula
12 + 12*eh_max (matching EXT4_EXTENT_TAIL_OFFSET in the kernel) rather
than block_size - 4.

Add round-trip tests for both checksum verification functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
